name: route_to
description: Forward the user's question to exactly ONE specialist agent and return their answer. Choose the specialist whose domain best matches the request.

specialist.description: Which specialist to route to: 'it' (IT Support — laptops, wifi, VPN, accounts, software), 'hr' (HR — PTO, benefits, leave, policies), 'facilities' (Facilities — rooms, AC, badges, parking, building issues), 'finance' (Finance & Expenses — reimbursements, corporate cards, expense reports)

question.description: The question to forward, rephrased clearly if needed but preserving the user's original intent
